prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `985ae207`.
codex_response:
Implemented `985ae207` in a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: each isolated `3x3` ring seed extends toward the nearest aligned edge of the solid rectangle whose color matches the seed center, repeating the `3x3` motif every 3 cells; the nearest strip of the target rectangle is overwritten by that repeated motif. I used the summary hint only as a starting point and corrected it in notes because it incorrectly implied the target rectangle stays intact.

The generator matches the task family by sampling one shared outer seed color, several large solid bars/rectangles in distinct center colors, and 2-5 isolated ring seeds with the same 3-cell alignment seen in the official task. No new reusable primitive was added.

Verification is complete: official examples `4/4` passed, generated examples `1000/1000` passed, and I visually checked the generated preview sheet.
